Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories, Form And Special, And Request For Production Of Documents, W/O Objections, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-17-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents (set #1) is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 15 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $716.30 are to be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
